pageContext.name: Chaos Space Marine C 03
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are excited to present the Chaos Space Marine C 03 Collectible Figure!  From the popular game Warhammer 40,000 comes the Space Marines of the Imperium of Man who dedicate themselves to chaos to achieve their own ends. Standing at 4.72' tall, this Renegade Marine is armed and ready to fight.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
